cyberware.tooltip.rune_arm_left: An upgrade of a mechanized arm. While it no longer allows the implementation of various upgrades, it can be included in runes using the rune infuser.
cyberware.tooltip.rune_arm_right: An upgrade of a mechanized arm. While it no longer allows the implementation of multiple upgrades, it can be infused with runes using the rune infuser.
cyberware.tooltip.rune_heart: An upgrade of a mechanized heart. While it no longer allows the implementation of multiple upgrades, it can be infused with runes using the rune infuser.
cyberware.tooltip.rune_leg_left: An upgrade of a mechanized leg. While it no longer allows the implementation of multiple upgrades, it can be infused with runes using the rune infuser.
cyberware.tooltip.rune_leg_right: An upgrade of a mechanized leg. While it no longer allows the implementation of multiple upgrades, it can be infused with runes using the rune infuser.
cyberware.tooltip.rune_infuser: A machine that allows so that members enhanced with arcane ingot are infused with runes.
